title: expand_vars: wasteful String alloc when no substitution occurs
description: evaluator.rs expand_vars (line 660) allocates out = String::with_capacity(s.len()) and pushes every character into it whenever s contains '\$' or '\\', even when no actual substitution ends up occurring (e.g. a bare backslash not followed by '$'). When modified == false the allocated String is discarded and Cow::Borrowed(s) is returned. Fix: either defer the String allocation to the first substitution event, or restructure to only allocate when the fast-path check passes but before the character loop.
